things.name: Notre-Dame de Bangui Cathedral
things.description: French colonial cathedral overlooking the Oubangui River

things.name: Bangui Central Market (Marche Central)
things.description: Vibrant market with extraordinary diamonds, gold and tropical produce

things.name: Presidential Palace & Oubangui River
things.description: Walk along the Congo River that marks the border with DR Congo

things.name: Musee de Boganda
things.description: Named after CAR's founding father - collections of traditional Banda and Baya art

things.name: Les Rapides de Bangui
things.description: Scenic Oubangui River rapids south of the city

things.name: Village Artisanal
things.description: Craft village with carvers, weavers and potters making traditional crafts

things.name: Dzanga-Sangha Reserve Day Trip
things.description: World-famous western lowland gorilla and forest elephant clearing - one of Africa's great wildlife experiences

things.name: Chinko Nature Reserve
things.description: Remote wilderness reserve with the last large populations of giant eland

things.name: French Colonial Quarter
things.description: Tree-lined avenues of the old French administrative quarter

things.name: Gozo (Cassava Porridge)
things.description: CAR staple - thick cassava porridge eaten with grilled meat or fish
